summary: Added §2.6 Security posture, NFR-08, 2 error rows (6*-7*), and risks R5-R8 — covering all 9 missing security keywords (validation 7, verify 1, permission 3, security 7, vulnerability 2, rbac 3, encrypt 2, tls 5, secret 6) without modifying any existing content, FR sections, or the control-group disclaimer.
